caption: A man with glasses and shoulder-length brown hair stands in a minimalist room with light-colored walls. He is wearing a black t-shirt featuring a yellow image and the white text "Kruth," along with a blue lanyard and an identification badge. In the initial scenes, he stands still and looks slightly downward. As the sequence progresses, he begins to smile and lift his right arm. By the final scene, he has raised his hand to his face, touching his glasses with his fingers. A black chair is partially visible in the lower foreground of each frame. The background remains static, consisting of a plain wall with a horizontal seam.
